creative_brief: Split screen: left shows industrial warehouse/truck convoy, right shows Rachel on her green pastures with cattle grazing naturally.
primary_text: You know the grocery system is broken when your beef travels 2,400km through multiple warehouses before reaching your plate. Rachel raises cattle on regenerative pastures in northern NSW. Her beef reaches FarmThru's Brookvale hub in 3 days. No wholesalers. No markups. Just direct connection between her farm and Sydney families who want to know where their food comes from.
headline: Own the grocery store fixing food
description: Equity crowdfunding now open on Birchal. From $50. Not financial advice.
